creator: so@i-clue.de
text:
The netatalk startup script does not specify its shell in the hash-bang
line. This yields strange error messages when executing it with another shell such as tcsh.

Fix: root@amnesix:/usr/local/etc/rc.d# diff -u netatalk.sh netatalk.sh.orig
How-To-Repeat: Execute "/usr/local/etc/rc.d/netatalk.sh start" with tcsh or csh.
